import * as React from 'react'
  /* @jsx mdx */
import { mdx } from '@mdx-js/react';
/* @jsx mdx */

export const _frontmatter = {};

const makeShortcode = name => function MDXDefaultShortcode(props) {
  console.warn("Component " + name + " was not imported, exported, or provided by MDXProvider as global scope");
  return <div {...props} />;
};

const ProjectCard = makeShortcode("ProjectCard");
const layoutProps = {
  _frontmatter
};
const MDXLayout = "wrapper";
export default function MDXContent({
  components,
  ...props
}) {
  return <MDXLayout {...layoutProps} {...props} components={components} mdxType="MDXLayout">
    <h2>{`Projects`}</h2>
    <ProjectCard title="NeurotechUofT" link="https://github.com/dhrumilp15/neurotech-objclassifier" bg="linear-gradient(to right, #D4145A 0%, #FBB03B 100%)" mdxType="ProjectCard">
      <p>{`I made an autonomous drone that catches balls within 600ms by calculating the
ball's flight path and a trajectory to catch it.`}</p>
    </ProjectCard>
    <ProjectCard title="Bacterial Op-Amps" link="https://github.com/dhrumilp15/Science-Fair" bg="linear-gradient(to right, #662D8C 0%, #ED1E79 100%)" mdxType="ProjectCard">
      <p>{`I simulated an operational amplifier using ordinary and delay differential
equations that modelled the substrate dynamics of a bacterial culture.`}</p>
    </ProjectCard>
    <ProjectCard title="CC Extractor" link="https://github.com/dhrumilp15/quiqui" bg="linear-gradient(to right, #009245 0%, #FCEE21 100%)" mdxType="ProjectCard">
      <p>{`As part of Google Code-In, I made several apps and tools while contributing to
CC Extractor, and contributed documented and scalable code to the organization
repositories. I mainly focused on mobile apps and Python.`}</p>
    </ProjectCard>
    <ProjectCard title="PorkNife" link="https://github.com/dhrumilp15/PorkNife" bg="linear-gradient(to right, #D585FF 0%, #00FFEE 100%)" mdxType="ProjectCard">
      <p>{`An awesome first-person raycasting-based Maze-solving Game for ICS 4U1,
replete with a minimap.`}</p>
    </ProjectCard>
  </MDXLayout>;
}
;
MDXContent.isMDXComponent = true;
